race.comment: I CATCHEM FOX (1) comes right into calculations after some key scratchings. Went forward last time at Murray Bridge and kept finding out in front, holding on to score by a neck. Claims an important 2kgs again. Will be giving himself every chance. ARISTONOUS (5) brings some strong Vic figures over the border and gets significant weight off. Has proven versatile with his speed this prep and is among the winning chances. EXALTED FIRE (6) is on the quick back-up and boasts peaks that measure up. Not dismissing. HOT TOO GO (7) was okay when resuming in testing conditions over the mile at Flemington last time. Better for that and is open to sharp improvement.
